object_recognition.caption: In this kitchen scene, a laptop is positioned on the left side, exhibiting thermal warmth from its screen. A white cutting board occupies the center, holding a carrot, a peeler, and a knife. To the right of the board is a white bowl, and further right is a power strip. My hands, appearing as thermal hotspots, enter the frame to begin food preparation.
